name: Orange Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your bread machine to the sweet bread cycle.
2. Add the orange sections, margarine, orange juice concentrate, sugar, and salt to the bread machine.
3. Add the flour and yeast on top of the wet ingredients.
4. Mix all the ingredients until a dough forms.
5. Place the dough in a greased baking dish and let it rise for about 30 minutes.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
7. Let the bread cool before slicing and serving.
